config.co_agents.enabled_desc: Tillat agenten å starte parallelle sub-agenter for komplekse oppgaver.
config.co_agents.disabled_desc: Aktiver for å la agenten delegere oppgaver til parallelle sub-agenter og spesialist-co-agenter.
config.co_agents.max_concurrent_desc: Maksimalt antall co-agenter som kjører samtidig.
config.co_agents.llm_desc: Velg en leverandør for co-agenter. Faller tilbake til hoved-LLM hvis ikke satt.
config.co_agents.specialists_desc: Specialist co-agents have role-specific prompts, tool restrictions, and optional dedicated LLM providers. Each specialist can be enabled independently.
config.co_agents.spec_researcher_desc: Nettsøk, kryssreferering og faktainnsamling. Ingen shell eller kodekjøring.
config.co_agents.spec_coder_desc: Shell, Python, filesystem, and Git operations. No image generation.
config.co_agents.spec_designer_desc: Bildegenerering og kreative ressurser. Ingen shell eller kodekjøring.
config.co_agents.spec_security_desc: Security audits, OWASP/CIS/NIST checks. Read-only filesystem access.
config.co_agents.spec_writer_desc: Documentation, content, reports. Memory and filesystem access, no code execution.
